member.name: T:Mediator.CachingMode
member.summary: Specifies the caching mode for Mediator initialization. Initialization consists of building fast lookups for resolving handlers and pre-building the message pipelines.

member.name: F:Mediator.CachingMode.Eager
member.summary: Eagerly initialize on first Mediator access. Best for long-running throughput-optimized scenarios where startup cost is amortized.

member.name: F:Mediator.CachingMode.Lazy
member.summary: Lazily initialize handler wrappers on demand as messages are processed. Best for cold start scenarios (e.g., serverless, Native AOT) where minimal initialization is preferred.

member.name: T:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions
member.summary: Provides telemetry options for Mediator.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions.EnableMetrics
member.summary: Enable metrics for message processing using . Requires .NET 8.0 or greater.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions.MeterName
member.summary: The name used for metrics.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions.EnableTracing
member.summary: Enable tracing for message processing using .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions.ActivitySourceName
member.summary: The name used for tracing.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorTelemetryOptions.HistogramBuckets
member.summary: Custom histogram bucket boundaries for the messaging.process.duration metric. If null, uses default boundaries.

member.name: T:Mediator.MediatorOptions
member.summary: Provide options for the Mediator source generator.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.Namespace
member.summary: The namespace in which the Mediator implementation is generated. By default, the namespace is "Mediator".

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.GenerateTypesAsInternal
member.summary: Wether or not generated types should be internal (they are public by default).

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.NotificationPublisherType
member.summary: The type to use when publishing notifications. By default, the type is .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.ServiceLifetime
member.summary: The default lifetime of the services registered in the DI container by the Mediator source generator. By default, the lifetime is .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.Assemblies
member.summary: The collection of assemblies to scan for Mediator handlers. By default, the collection is empty, in which case the source generator will scan all assemblies through references from the source generated project.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.Types
member.summary: The collection of types to include for generation. Supports concrete types, interfaces, and abstract base types. A message is included when it is assignable to one or more configured types. Applies to requests, commands, queries, stream variants, and notifications. When empty or not configured, all discovered messages are included (no filtering).

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.PipelineBehaviors
member.summary: The collection of types of pipeline behaviors to register in DI. When the type is an unconstructed generic type, the source generator will register all the constructed types of the generic type (open generics that is supported during AoT).

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.StreamPipelineBehaviors
member.summary: The collection of types of streaming pipeline behaviors to register in DI. When the type is an unconstructed generic type, the source generator will register all the constructed types of the generic type (open generics that is supported during AoT).

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.CachingMode
member.summary: The caching mode for Mediator initialization. When set to (default), all initialization is done on first Mediator access. When set to , initialization is done on demand as messages are processed.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptions.Telemetry
member.summary: Telemetry options for Mediator.

member.name: T:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute
member.summary: Provide options for the Mediator source generator.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.Namespace
member.summary: The namespace in which the Mediator implementation is generated. By default, the namespace is "Mediator".

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.NotificationPublisherType
member.summary: The type to use when publishing notifications. By default, the type is .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.ServiceLifetime
member.summary: The default lifetime of the services registered in the DI container by the Mediator source generator. By default, the lifetime is .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.CachingMode
member.summary: The caching mode for Mediator initialization. When set to (default), all initialization is done on first Mediator access. When set to , initialization is done on demand as messages are processed.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.TelemetryEnableMetrics
member.summary: Enable metrics for message processing using . Requires .NET 8.0 or greater.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.TelemetryMeterName
member.summary: The name used for metrics.

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.TelemetryEnableTracing
member.summary: Enable tracing for message processing using .

member.name: P:Mediator.MediatorOptionsAttribute.TelemetryActivitySourceName
member.summary: The name used for tracing.

member.name: T:Mediator.AssemblyReference
member.summary: Represents an assembly reference. This is used to specify the types or assemblies to scan for Mediator handlers.

member.name: P:Mediator.AssemblyReference.Assembly
member.summary: The assembly reference.

member.name: M:Mediator.AssemblyReference.op_Implicit(System.Type)~Mediator.AssemblyReference
member.summary: Creates a new instance of from the specified type.

member.name: M:Mediator.AssemblyReference.op_Implicit(System.Reflection.Assembly)~Mediator.AssemblyReference
member.summary: Creates a new instance of from the specified assembly.

member.name: T:Mediator.Mediator
member.summary: Generated code for Mediator implementation. This type is also registered as a DI service. Can be used directly for high performance scenarios.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.ServiceLifetime
member.summary: The lifetime of Mediator-related service registrations in DI container.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.CachingMode
member.summary: The caching mode configuration for Mediator handler resolution.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.NotificationPublisherName
member.summary: The name of the notification publisher service that was configured.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.TotalMessages
member.summary: The total number of Mediator messages that were discovered.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.MeterName
member.summary: The configured telemetry meter name.

member.name: F:Mediator.Mediator.ActivitySourceName
member.summary: The configured telemetry activity source name.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Constructor for DI, should not be used by consumer.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Send``1(Mediator.IRequest{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send request. Throws if message is null. Throws if request does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.CreateStream``1(Mediator.IStreamRequest{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create stream for request. Throws if message is null. Throws if request does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Send``1(Mediator.ICommand{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send command. Throws if message is null. Throws if command does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.CreateStream``1(Mediator.IStreamCommand{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create stream for command. Throws if message is null. Throws if command does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Send``1(Mediator.IQuery{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send query. Throws if message is null. Throws if query does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.CreateStream``1(Mediator.IStreamQuery{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create stream for query. Throws if message is null. Throws if query does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Send(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send message. Throws if message is null. Throws if message does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.CreateStream(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create stream. Throws if message is null. Throws if message does not implement . Throws if no handler is registered.

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Publish(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish notification. Throws if message is null. Throws if notification does not implement . Throws if handlers throw exception(s). Drops messages

member.name: M:Mediator.Mediator.Publish``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish notification. Throws if message is null. Throws if notification does not implement . Throws if handlers throw exception(s).

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.MediatorDependencyInjectionExtensions
member.summary: DI extensions for Mediator.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.MediatorDependencyInjectionExtensions.AddMediator(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the Mediator implementation and handlers of your application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.MediatorDependencyInjectionExtensions.AddMediator(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Mediator.MediatorOptions})
member.summary: Adds the Mediator implementation and handlers of your application, with specified options.
